JUDGE JULIE TANG STEVEN E. LITTMAN FOR THE PLTF. DEFT IN PRO PER & NOT PRESENT. 10:19 AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT, EXCEP EXCEPT DEFT. PWS&E JAMES BLAIR THOMAS PLTF'S EXH. # 1 - LEASE AGREEMENT ID & EVID " 2 - 30 DAY NOTICE " " JUDGMENT FOR THE PLAINTIFF & AGAINST DEFT. FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES, FOR $912.50 RENTS THRU TODAY, FOR FORFEITURE OF THE LEASE AGREEMENT. EXHIBITS W/DRAWN. PLTF. PREPARED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALL, EDWARD L. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 163 STRATFORD COURT, S.F. CA 94132 $912.50 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $912.50, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
